NACS640 Foundational Readings Seminar (2 Credits)

An introduction to the breadth of research in Neuroscience and Cognitive Science. Faculty will present papers to provide historical context and introduction to important issues in the fields of their research. Restriction: Permission of instructor; and must be in Neurosciences and Cognitive Sciences (Doctoral) program.

Credit Only Granted for. NACS640 or NACS728R.
